title: Hen-Roost Man, The
content:
De Hen-roost Man he'll preach about Paul,
    An' James an' John, an' Herod, an' all,
    But nuver a word about Peter, oh, no!
    He's afeard he'll hear dat rooster crow.
            An' he ain't by 'isself in dat, in dat,
            An' he ain't by 'isself in dat.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ruth McEnery Stuart delivers a powerful performance in "Hen-Roost Man, The"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
